name: The strongest boxer
description: The invincible boxer game is a combat game with action breakthrough. The pictures in the game are cartoon interesting. Players can control your characters to carry out different battles and collect more big fists. They can hit higher damage in the fight, eat other opponents and make themselves stronger.
instructions: 1 In the game we need to better master the game skills make the boxing more and more powerful and better avoid the collision of the other side 2 Collect fists with superb technology to make them bigger and bigger so that they can eat other opponents
